title: Cinnamomum estrellense

Cinnamomum estrellense is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, a type of evergreen tree native to certain regions. The health benefits of Cinnamomum estrellense include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which may help to prevent or treat various health conditions. The most common herbal preparations made with Cinnamomum estrellense include teas, essential oils, and infusions, which are used to promote relaxation, relieve stress, and support digestive health.
uses: Cinnamomum estrellense, also known as the Star Cinnamon tree, is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
